title: senecio jacobaea proles erraticus
intro: Senecio jacobaea proles erraticus, commonly known as ragwort, is a toxic plant species within the daisy family. It contains toxic pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio jacobaea proles erraticus include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, are typically prepared in small quantities due to its toxicity and should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
